title: Crosshair Bobbing
description: This mod allows the crosshair to follow the view bobbing and play the animation according to the player's actions.
body:
# Crosshair Bobbing
This mod will add the following effects to your crosshair:
- Bobbing animation. (only when View Bobbing is enabled)
- Shaking animation for attack mobs and destroy blocks.
- Charging animation for bow, trident and crossbow.
- Special animation for eating and drinking.

![Animation](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/paCz780b/images/3223dd4424b42c830802301acd93f7216bc0e6bd.gif)  
[Click *Gallery* to watch more screenshots.](https://modrinth.com/mod/xbob/gallery)

### Modloader
This mod has been written for Minecraft 1.16.2-1.20.1 with Fabric/Quilt Modloader and 1.16.3-1.20.1 with Forge Modloader.
